'Stop, stop, stop': Listen to LaGuardia control tower audio during collisionAn Air Canada plane carrying 72 passengers and four crew initially landed safely from Montreal on Sunday evening before colliding with a firefighting vehicle. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/clyer72wn85o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/clyer72wn85o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 15:04:25 GMT
PM warns against 'false comfort' of thinking Iran war will end quicklyThe PM also tells senior MPs the conflict was "not our war" and there must be a "lawful basis" for any UK involvement. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy01l49kkgdo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy01l49kkgdo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 16:46:51 GMT
HS2 trains could run slower than planned to save moneyThe government is looking at ways to make much-delayed London to Birmingham railway line cheaper to deliver. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czex3lj077xo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czex3lj077xo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 16:39:09 GMT
How a content creator hoped a YouTube alibi would help him avoid justice for murderEvidence in the trial of Stephen McCullagh outlined a cold, calculating plan to kill Natalie McNally and get away with it. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g8d8pz0xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g8d8pz0xyo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 16:08:35 GMT
Is ex-Google boss Matt Brittin the right person to steer the BBC?BBC media editor Katie Razzall says the former Google exec has been chosen for his insider knowledge of big tech. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce9mz082y5go?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce9mz082y5go#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 13:50:02 GMT

Huel bought by Danone in €1bn dealThe health firm backed by actor Idris Elba and broadcaster Jonathan Ross is being bought by Danone, reportedly for €1bn (£860m). https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czre7pl600go?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czre7pl600go#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 15:50:44 GMT

Trump says 'good' talks ongoing with Iran - but offers few detailsAn early morning post from Trump soothed panicked markets, but the extent of any talks remains unclear. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75kl47zez3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75kl47zez3o#1 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 15:00:06 GMT
